DROP TABLE IF EXISTS test_json; CREATE TABLE test_json(json JSON) ENGINE = Memory; INSERT INTO test_json VALUES ("{\"a\": 42, \"b\": \"Hello\"}"), ("{\"b\": [1, 2, 3], \"c\": {\"d\": {\"e\": \"2020-01-01\"}}}"), ("{\"a\": 43, \"c\": {\"d\": {\"f\": [{\"g\": 42}]}}}"); SELECT distinctJSONPathsAndTypes(json) FROM test_json;

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS test_json; CREATE TABLE test_json(json JSON) ENGINE = Memory; INSERT INTO test_json VALUES ("{\"name\": \"Alice\", \"age\": 30}"); SELECT distinctJSONPathsAndTypes(json) FROM test_json;

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS test_json; CREATE TABLE test_json(json JSON) ENGINE = Memory; INSERT INTO test_json VALUES ("{\"array\": [1, 2, 3], \"object\": {\"key\": \"value\"}}"); SELECT distinctJSONPathsAndTypes(json) FROM test_json;

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS test_json; CREATE TABLE test_json(json JSON) ENGINE = Memory; INSERT INTO test_json VALUES ("{\"alpha\": [{\"beta\": 1}, {\"beta\": 2}], \"gamma\": \"text\"}"); SELECT distinctJSONPathsAndTypes(json) FROM test_json;

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS test_json; CREATE TABLE test_json(json JSON) ENGINE = Memory; INSERT INTO test_json VALUES ("{\"nested\": {\"object\": {\"key1\": 10, \"key2\": \"val\"}}}"); SELECT distinctJSONPathsAndTypes(json) FROM test_json;

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS test_json; CREATE TABLE test_json(json JSON) ENGINE = Memory; INSERT INTO test_json VALUES ("{\"mix\": [true, false, 1.5, \"string\"]}"); SELECT distinctJSONPathsAndTypes(json) FROM test_json;

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS test_json_a; CREATE TABLE test_json_a(json JSON) ENGINE = Memory; INSERT INTO test_json_a VALUES ("{\"x\": 5}"); DROP TABLE IF EXISTS test_json_b; CREATE TABLE test_json_b(json JSON) ENGINE = Memory; INSERT INTO test_json_b VALUES ("{\"y\": 10}"); SELECT distinctJSONPathsAndTypes(a.json) FROM test_json_a AS a JOIN test_json_b AS b ON a.json->'x' = b.json->'y';

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS test_json; CREATE TABLE test_json(json JSON) ENGINE = Memory; INSERT INTO test_json VALUES ("{\"success\": true}"); SELECT distinctJSONPathsAndTypes(json) FROM test_json WHERE json->'success' = true;

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS test_json; CREATE TABLE test_json(json JSON) ENGINE = Memory; INSERT INTO test_json VALUES ("{\"level1\": {\"level2\": {\"level3\": 7}}}"); SELECT distinctJSONPathsAndTypes(json) FROM test_json;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS test_json; CREATE TABLE test_json(json JSON) ENGINE = Memory; INSERT INTO test_json VALUES ("{\"empty\": null}"); SELECT distinctJSONPathsAndTypes(json) FROM test_json;
